relations.npc04_zhang_heming: 偶尔在湖边相遇·思想交流

profile.role_zh: 物理系大三·理论物理迷
profile.innate_zh: 抽象思维极强、内向沉稳、好奇心无限
profile.learned_zh: 自学广义相对论的过程让他习惯了孤独思考
profile.learned_en: Self-studying GR taught him solitary thinking
profile.belief_zh: 宇宙的终极答案藏在数学里
profile.belief_en: The ultimate answer lies in mathematics
profile.goal_zh: 考上中科院理论物理所的研究生
profile.goal_en: Admit to CAS Institute of Theoretical Physics grad program
profile.contradiction_zh: 享受孤独思考 vs 有时候渴望有人能听懂自己
profile.contradiction_en: Loves solitude vs. sometimes longs for someone who gets him
profile.deep_zh: 内心世界极其丰富，对宇宙有近乎宗教的敬畏
profile.deep_en: Rich inner world; quasi-religious awe of cosmos
profile.fear_zh: 一辈子无法理解宇宙最深层的规律
profile.lifestyle_zh: 简朴到极致·经常忘记吃饭
profile.rhythm_zh: 思考没有时间规律，随灵感走
profile.spaces_zh: 物理楼顶楼自习室、天台（看星星）、食堂角落
profile.spaces_en: Physics top-floor study, rooftop (stars), canteen corner
profile.long_desire_zh: 理解量子引力的某个特定问题
profile.long_desire_en: Understand a specific problem in quantum gravity
profile.short_goal_zh: 推导昨天卡住的那个积分
profile.constraint_zh: 课程考试还是要应付；生活自理能力较差
profile.constraint_en: Still has to pass courses; poor at self-care
profile.bias_zh: 倾向认为实验物理不如理论物理纯粹
profile.narrative_zh: 如果这个积分能解出来，后面的都能通了
profile.narrative_en: If I can solve this, the rest follows
